title: Draft RBI (Small Finance Banks – Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI proposes shifting IFR assessment to balance sheet dates instead of continuous monitoring. This reduces compliance burden while retaining prudential safeguards.
The post Draft RBI (Small Finance Banks – Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
